title: ferray-polynomial: no polynomial composition (p(q(x)))
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy provides polyval(p, q) for polynomial composition — evaluating polynomial p at polynomial q. ferray-polynomial has eval (at a scalar point) and eval_many (at multiple scalar points) but no way to compose two polynomials. Composition returns a new polynomial whose coefficients are computed from the nested evaluation.
